name: Woodcraft
author: Poki
description: Woodcraft is a simulation game where you get do your own woodworking! Cut out the right piece of wood and spray paint it over to make your own unique creations. Sell your work to the highest bidder to buy new cool grinders, drills and sprays! How to play: Hold down your Left Mouse Button to use the selected tool. About the creator: Woodcraft was created by Fomo Games. This is their fifth game on Poki after Doctor Hero , Screw Factory , Perfect Peel and Cookie Master .
